faqs.question: Why is rat control important in Sutton Place apartments and townhouses?
faqs.answer: Sutton Place's proximity to the East River, aging infrastructure in historic buildings, and dense urban environment create conditions where rats can thrive. faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes a thorough inspection of your Sutton Place property, identification of entry points and nesting areas, strategic placement of commercial-grade traps and bait stations, sealing of access points, and follow-up visits to ensure complete elimination.
